subject: Weekly News: 01/01/2046
preview: Lower Manhattan disappearances and a Pacific sky object.
bodyHtml:
Local authorities are investigating missing-person reports following New Year's Eve celebrations in Lower Manhattan.

Several individuals were last seen near waterfront transit infrastructure connected to a long-decommissioned subway route.

  • Personal belongings recovered near tunnel entrances and restricted service doors.
  • Reports of rapid scratching, skittering, and high-frequency squeaks in the area.

As Southeast Asia welcomed 2046, a mysterious object was observed in the central Pacific Ocean, roughly 1,200 kilometers east of the Mariana Islands.

images.captionHtml: Recorded by scientists from the University of Shanghai. Origin and purpose remain unknown.
